n1.title: FlowTech in TOP-1000 University Startups
n1.summary: FlowTech wind tunnel ranked #65 in the TOP-1000 university startups rating. The Tiamat unmanned vessel also entered the TOP-250 best startups nationwide.

n2.title: Moscow Innovator 2025 Grant
n2.summary: Engineer of Atmosphere LLC received a grant from the Moscow Mayor's 'Innovator of Moscow 2025' competition with the Tiamat project in the 'Ecology and Environmental Protection' category.

n3.title: FlowTech at Moscow Startup Summit 2025
n3.summary: The first international summit by Sber and the Moscow Government gathered over 5,000 participants from 40 countries. FlowTech presented at the Youth Startups Demo Day.

n4.title: National Award 'People Change the Country'
n4.summary: The CEO of Engineer of Atmosphere LLC became a laureate of the First National Award 'People Change the Country'. The ceremony took place at Zaryadye Concert Hall.

n5.title: Grand Prize at Archipelago 2025
n5.summary: FlowTech team won the grand prize at the 'Archipelago 2025' project-educational intensive — Russia's largest platform for technology startups.

n6.title: Flow Technologies Competition
n6.summary: FlowTech and University 2035 co-organized the 'Flow Technologies' competition — an aerodynamic design contest for students and young engineers.

n7.title: FlowTech — NTI Fund Portfolio Company
n7.summary: Engineer of Atmosphere LLC joined the NTI Project Support Fund portfolio, confirming the project's high technological potential.

n8.title: Partnership with University 2035
n8.summary: FlowTech and University 2035 signed a cooperation agreement on developing educational programs for unmanned aviation.
